steps.text: Identify who founded SpaceX and in what year, using authoritative sources (e.g., SpaceX, biographies, major news).
Gather an overview timeline of the Falcon 1 program from inception to retirement.
Identify and document key technical and programmatic milestones of Falcon 1 (first launch attempts, first successes, failures).
Confirm dates and significance of each key Falcon 1 milestone from multiple sources where possible.
Synthesize findings into a concise narrative answering who founded SpaceX, when, and the key milestones of the Falcon 1 program.
